description_long: This is a small, streamlined bird with a slender body and a relatively long, straight tail. Its plumage is predominantly gray with subtle gradients, featuring slightly darker tones on the wings and back, and lighter shades on the underside. The head is rounded with a short, pointed beak that is well-suited for insectivorous feeding. The wings are compact and lie close to the body, giving the bird a sleek appearance. The legs are short and not prominently visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body. The overall form and coloration are typical of urban-adapted passerine birds often seen in parks and gardens.
description: A small, gray bird with a streamlined body, pointed beak, and long, straight tail. Its plumage features subtle gradients from dark gray to light gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's slender profile, long tail, and smooth gradient from dark to light gray along the body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight tail and the symmetrical arrangement of the wings and body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the same streamlined body and subtle feather texture.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded head, pointed beak, and the slight tapering of the body toward the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid gray with subtle gradients and slightly darker wings and tail
